Addario’s story will be seen in the movie theater. ▲ 閱讀下文,回答第 37-41 題。 On the early morning of April 15, 1912, the British passenger liner hit an iceberg in the North Atlantic Ocean and sank on her first voyage from Southampton to New York City. This is the story of Titanic, which everyone is familiar with. Since then, books, exhibits and films about the accident have been created. Years after, many people are still interested in the story. An Australian billionaire, Clive Palmer, announced his plans to build a copy of the ship named Titanic II. It will have been completed by 2018. The construction of the ship began in a Chinese government-owned shipyard. Almost everything in the new ship matches the feature of the original, except for some differences. The new Titanic will have a helicopter landing pad, air conditioning, and far more lifeboats than those on the original. The engineering challenges would drive the construction cost approximately twice than that of a modern cruise ship. Palmer will also sell first, second and third class tickets, and, like on the real Titanic, passengers won’t be able to interact with others outside their own class. Some criticize Palmer’s idea to construct the ship. Family members of those who died in the tragedy feel that recreating an experience that had ended in so many deaths is in poor taste; Titanic II has itself been described as “insensitive” and “a mockery of the memory of those who died.” However, the CEO of the shipyard stated that they “have always been very mindful and very respectful of such a tragic event and don’t think that building a replica or a ‘II’ is inappropriate.”
questions.explanation: 從文章中可推論出什麼? 3 1 個空格正確,另 1 個空格部分正確。 (A) Addario 會因為危險而放棄記者工作。 2 僅 1 個空格正確或 2 個空格皆部分正確。 (B) Addario 的家人阻止她的工作。 1 (C) Addario 從此不再踏進利比亞工作。 1 個空格錯誤,另 1 個空格部分正確。 (D) Addario 的故事將能在電影院看到。 (1) 空白 ( 未書寫文字 ) 。 Question 37-41 0 (2) 文字零碎、形同未答。 在 1912 年 4 月 15 日清早,英國客輪在首航由南安 (3) 只抄題目或其他試題。 普敦到紐約的行程中,在北大西洋撞上冰山然後沉沒。 (4) 內容完全錯誤。 這是大家熟悉的鐵達尼號故事。從此,關於這個意外的 書籍、展覽和影片因應而生。多年之後,很多人仍對這 II. 句子重組 個故事深感興趣。
